title: Life's a Bitch
overview: To please Cecile, Tom agrees to adopt her dead neighbour’s Chihuahua. Actress Greta is crushed. Her dog and her assistant both died, run over by a bus. Franck and Lola fall in love at first sight. They have so much in common, except Lola doesn’t like dogs. Three intertwined destinies, three stories of humans and their dogs.

trailers.title: CHIENNES DE VIES (Xavier Seron) Arieh Worthalter, Mara Taquin, Jean-Jacques Rausin.
